title: Your ZIP is 20.4MB. Etsy's limit is 20MB.
description: Every Etsy print seller hits the 20MB ZIP limit eventually. 300 DPI files are large — 70 files across 5 packs easily exceeds Etsy's hard cap. SnapToSize compresses automatically and tests every ZIP before you download. Always under 20MB. 300 DPI preserved. snaptosize.com
